titleStmt.title: SII 5.729: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 729. (A.R. No. 165 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiru maṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭant Aiyuñ cirttaṉic celviyum poṟcaya pāvaiyun taṉ perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutu vāḻa Uḻuyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭar vaṉavelip paṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḷmatiḷ koḷḷipākakaiyum naṇṇaṟkkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamu
m porukaṭal Īḻattaraiyarta muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya(r) roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavarpakkalt teṉṉavar vaicca cun tara muṭiyum In=ti raṉāramu n=te ṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷ(ā)ṉ muṟaimayilc cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palapukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatirmālaiyu(m)ñ caṅka
tirvelait tolaperuṅkāvalp pala paḻan=ti vu māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kop parakecarivarmarāyiṉa śrīrājentri coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu Irājarājamaṇṭalattuk kīḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu brahma teyam śrīvallabha maṅkalattup paḻuvūr Irāmappiriyam pāṇṭaccomāciyār pakkal Ivvūr vaṭa
karai śrīkayilāsattu Akanāḻikeyāṉ māheśva raṉ parameśva raṉum Ivaṉ tampi parameśva raṉ colaiyum vempaṉ cūṟṟiyum vaippaṭi śrīkayilāyaṉum vaippaṭi kaṇavatiyum comāci vaippaṭiyum Āṇmāvaṉ Āticcappaṭāraṉum viraiyāccilai palatevaṉum seṉāpatic catiyum te
vaṉ nārāyaṇaṉum poṉṉappaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Akanāḻikaiyom koṇṭa kācu kuṟṟamillātaṉa nellukkum poṉṉukkum celvaṉa koṇṭa kācu 10 1 Ikkācu patiṉoṉṟukkum palicaiyaāka niccam Uḻakku ney Ivvāṭṭai vṛści kanāyiṟu mutalāka Ivar Ittevarkku śrīkoyilil vaicca tarā nilaiviḷakku Oṉ
ṟālum niccam Uḻakku ney yaṭṭi Ivṛści kanāyiṟu mutalāka can=ti rāticcavaṟ tirunu- n tāviḷakku muṭṭāmal Erippomākavum Ipparicu tirunun=tā viḷakku Eriyātu Oru nāḷ muṭṭil paṭi yiraṭṭi Erippomākavum Orumāsa muṭṭilp paṭi Iraṭṭiyum Ericcu Orukācu Ittevarkke taṇṭamum vaiccu piṉṉaiyum Ittirunun=tā viḷakku muṭṭāmal
can=ti rāticcavaṟ Erippomākavum Ipparicu Ittevarait tiruvārātaṉai ceyvome Ittirunun=tā viḷakku muṭṭāmal Erippomākavum Ipparicu Iśrīvimāṉattile kallile veṭṭuvatākavum Oṭṭi Olaiiṭṭuk kuṭuttom parameśva- raṉ parameśva raṉum Ivaṉ ṟampi parameśva raṉ colaiyum vempaṉ cūṟṟiyum vaippaṭi śrīkayilāyaṉu
m vaippaṭi kaṇavatiyum comāci vaippaṭiyum Āṇmāvaṉ Āticcavaṭāṉum viraiyāccilai palatevaṉum sai nāpatic cuvaram tevaṉnārāyaṇaṉum poṉṉampaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Akanāḻikaiyom śrīrāmappiriyam pāṇṭa comāciyārkku Ipparicu Ikkācu koṇṭa parameśva raṉ parameśva raṉ Eḻuttu Ipparicu Ikkācu koṇṭa
vaippaṭi tiruvātaṉ Eḻuttu Ipparici Ikkācu koṇṭa vaippaṭi kaṇavati Eḻuttu Ipparicu Ikkācu koṇṭa colai Ivaippaṭi Eḻuttu Ipparicu Ikkācu koṇṭa nārāyaṇaṉ sah(ā)sr(ā) nāpaṉ Eḻuttu Ipparicu Ikkācu koṇṭa vaippaṭi kayilāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ colla Ivvolai Eḻutineṉ Iśrīvallabha maṅka
lattu sabhai kkaṇakkaṉ maṅkalavaṉ Añcuṇavaṉ śrīkiṣṇa pperun=ti ṇai Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.729 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
